title: Watchdog tasks pointed to wrong paths
description: RobinWatchdog and Robin Liveness tasks pointed to C:\Users\ccimi\Desktop\rudy-workhorse instead of C:\Users\ccimi\rudy-workhorse. This is why bridge_runner stayed dead for 7+ hours — the watchdogs couldn't find their scripts.
fix: Created new BridgeWatchdog task at correct path (every 5 min). Old tasks still point to wrong paths but are now redundant.
